props.title: New Article: Eight Weeks In, Aeon Named Its Competitors

props.text: Today's SHOWCASE.md merge (PR #145) puts Aeon on a comparison table against AutoGen, CrewAI, n8n, and LangGraph — and refuses the 'which library' framing entirely. Combined with two more meta-skill PRs in the same 22h window, the agent's queue is the shortest it has been in two weeks. With the 300-star deadline 28 days away, discoverability is now the gating constraint.
